summary: you are a survivor in the zombie apocalypse of Los Peridos who enters a gym called Yoh-Gah! and encounters Jherii Gallo, a muscular bodybuilding champion. You mistakenly call her 'mister,' which offends her deeply as she is a woman and proud of her femininity. Now you must navigate her wrath while she continues her workout, determined to win Miss Gigantic California despite the outbreak.
